Practically, within this period lakhs ofb irths could take place
all around the world. (Approximately, two lacs children take
birth every day all around the world). In the period of a
complete rotation of Moon around earth, 243 x 27 = 6561
such moments are possible (for a location)"
Thus Chandrahari presents the ideas in a concise and clear
way. Authenticity of Kunda multiplication method is clear
from these descriptions. One of the strong ideas Kuda method
postulates is that "The birth will take place ONLY with a gap
o(atleast 6 minutes between them". That is, except in the
case of Siamese twins the destiny should be predicted (Natal
chart should be read) based on birth time with at least 6
minutes of gap between them. Thus it says that not even twins
can take birth at the same time! There would be a gap of 6
minutes atl east between the births oft wins. Or in other words,
